TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sinevaudjan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 216 buwan, 602 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 585 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Maljipa. tay mkyahu' na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Kus kus. tay 'llaw na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Macaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕine*au*jan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa maljipa. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa kus~ɕ kus~ɕ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa maʦ~ʨaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sinevaudjan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 216 buwan, 602 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 585 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Maljipa. tay mkyahu' na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Kus kus. tay 'llaw na Sinevaudjan hya' ga Macaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕine*au*jan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa maljipa. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa kus~ɕ kus~ɕ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕine*au*jan ħjaʔ ɣa maʦ~ʨaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
